title: Kid's Folding Farm Table - 30'' x 72'' - Rustic - H-Legs
features: Our 6' x 30'' Kids Folding Farm Table is virtually the same as our popular 8' x 40'' Solid Pine Folding Farm Table, but downsized so the kids at the party can also get in on the action.

Shipping fully assembled, This children's folding farm table arrives with a smooth, beautiful pine top finish that gives way to sturdy, durable folding legs that seamlessly lock into place, supported by steel black folding bars and a pin.
Why add only one of these tables to your inventory?
Free shipping is included when you purchase 10+ or combine with a chair and table order over 2k!

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more
